\tzpentry{ID5581}{Kinetic Term Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5581 introduces Kinetic Term Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ K_{ij} = K_0 \frac{\exp(-|r_i - r_j|/L)}{|r_i - r_j| + \varepsilon}\,, \tag{3}\]
